title: Reflective Nylon Dog Collar with Safety Buckle, Adjustable Pet Collars with Soft Neoprene Padding (Red, M)
features: 【Safety Buckle】 Side release buckle is made out of quality eco-friendly ABS plastic with safety lock to prevent the collar from accidentally opening. Please check the red safety button before use.

【Soft Neoprene Padded】 The cushion from this exclusive feature gives maximum comfort to dogs during activities. No sharp edges or unfold sewing joint. This prevents any irritation on the neck and makes it an all-weather dog collar.
【360° Reflective Straps】Highly reflective threads keep high visibility at night for safety, and you can easy find your furry pet in the back yard at night.
【High Quality】 Durable & Light Weight- Made of a 100% real nylon with good stitching, lightweight but durable, good for all conditions.

【Strong & Easy to Use】High density webbing, quick release buckle, soft padded and D ring hardware, this collar will make your pet look adorable and elegant, with a separate loop on the collar makes it easy to add dog tags and leads onto the collar.
description: Product Description Basic Dog Dollar Nylon Dog Collar with Safety Locking Buckle Ideal personalized dog collars for small medium large boys & girls. Non-slip adjustable loop can easily adjust the size, Please take measurement of your dog's neck circumference before order placed. Safe and convenience Quick release buckle with satety lock let you put on or take off the collar easily Neoprene Padding Won't irritate your dog's neck. This dog collar was padded with 3mm neoprene,extremely soft and comfortable Non-slip adjustable loop Can easily adjust the size, 5 sizes for all dog breeds
